action.description: Action performed (published, unpublished, created, edited, deleted, prereleased, released)

site_admin.description: Whether user is a site administrator

draft.description: Whether the release is a draft

assets.description: Array of release asset objects with download URLs

site_admin.description: Whether user is a site administrator

tag_name.description: Git tag name for the release

prerelease.description: Whether the release is a pre-release

event_type.description: GitHub event type from X-GitHub-Event header (e.g., release)

fork.description: Whether the repository is a fork

site_admin.description: Whether owner is a site administrator

mirror_url.description: Mirror URL if repository is a mirror

value.content: Summarize changes from this GitHub release

Here is the release information:

Release Name: <githubtrigger.release.name>
Tag: <githubtrigger.release.tag_name>
Repository: <githubtrigger.repository.full_name>

Release Notes:
<githubtrigger.release.body>

Please provide a concise summary of what changed in this release.

content.value:
- Connect Slack Account and select Channel 
**Permissions needed:** `chat:write` to post messages

**Required:**
- GitHub OAuth connection
- `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` environment variable

**Setup Steps:**
1. Connect GitHub OAuth
2. Generate a webhook secret: `openssl rand -hex 32`
3. Set `GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET` environment variable with the generated secret
4. In your GitHub repo, configure webhook URL pointing to this workflow
5. Use the same secret in GitHub webhook settings

channel.description: Channel ID where message was sent

user.description: User ID who sent the message

type.description: Block type (section, divider, image, actions, etc.)

blocks.description: Block Kit blocks in the message

bot_id.description: Bot ID if sent by a bot

user.description: User ID who edited the message

edited.description: Edit information if message was edited

pinned_to.description: Channel IDs where message is pinned

count.description: Number of times this reaction was added

users.description: Array of user IDs who reacted

is_starred.description: Whether message is starred by user

subscribed.description: Whether user is subscribed to thread

color.description: Color bar hex code or preset

reply_count.description: Total number of replies in thread

unread_count.description: Number of unread messages in thread

parent_user_id.description: User ID of thread parent message author

reply_users_count.description: Number of unique users who replied

message.description: Complete message object with all properties returned by Slack

fileCount.description: Number of files uploaded (when files are attached)
